extractions.problem: Whole-cell modelling applications in lab experiment design and predictive drug testing
extractions.method: Machine learning pipeline for whole-cell model analysis
extractions.finding: Pipeline for weak labelling, neural network classification, and network analysis

extractions.problem: High-throughput omics technologies impact on fundamental and translational research
extractions.method: Genome-scale metabolic model reconstruction for red blood cells
extractions.finding: Generated refined RBC-GEM reconstruction from iAB-RBC-283

extractions.problem: Developing whole-cell computational platform for HBV infection cycle in hepatocytes
extractions.method: Combined spatial and kinetic models of HBV infection cycle
extractions.finding: Constructed spatially-resolved hepatocyte model for HBV infection

extractions.problem: Realistic electrophysiological descriptions of C. elegans neurons
extractions.method: Electrophysiological modeling of interneurons and motor neurons
extractions.finding: Models of three interneurons (AVA, RIM, AIY) and three motor neurons (VA5, VB6, VD5)

extractions.problem: Understanding cell-cell interactions from single-cell data
extractions.method: Agent-based modeling framework integrating gene expression with ligand-receptor interactions
extractions.finding: CellAgentChat framework for comprehensive cell-cell interaction analysis

extractions.problem: Subunit vaccines have lower immunogenicity compared to whole-cell vaccines
extractions.finding: Evaluated reactogenic responses to vaccine formulations

extractions.problem: Whole-microbe inactivation technology for rapid pathogen inactivation retaining epitopes
extractions.finding: Technology enables rapid pathogen inactivation while retaining epitope integrity

extractions.problem: Novel approach using dedicated hardware for whole-cell simulation of mRNA translation
extractions.method: Hardware-based whole-cell simulation of mRNA translation
extractions.finding: Demonstrated approach for whole-cell translation simulation

extractions.problem: Immunological synapse formation and TCR-pMHC affinity impact on T cell activation
extractions.method: Agent-based model replicating T cell activation on supported lipid bilayers
extractions.finding: Model replicated T cell activation experiments

extractions.problem: High quality data prerequisite for precise whole-cell models
extractions.method: Data curation for whole-cell model parameterization
extractions.finding: Reviewed data requirements for whole-cell model construction
